bead.title: Stage 1.1: draft schema.graphql types + queries
bead.description: Draft the initial GraphQL schema covering all types and query entry points needed by the new SvelteKit UI. Create new file cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql. Schema must include: Node, Project, Bead/BeadConnection/BeadEdge (Relay cursor connection), Document, DocGraph, Commit/CommitConnection, Worker, AgentSession, Persona, ExecutionRun, CoordinatorMetrics. Every field doc-commented. Every existing GET /api/* list endpoint in cli/internal/server/server.go:334-417 must have a corresponding Query. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #1 for full context.
bead.acceptance: (1) File cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql exists and parses: `go run github.com/99designs/gqlgen generate --config cli/internal/server/graphql/gqlgen.yml` (or a dry-run equivalent) completes without schema errors. (2) Manual: open the file and point at each GET /api/* in server.go:334-417 — for each, name the GraphQL Query that replaces it. No REST endpoint is orphaned. (3) Every type field has a doc comment. (4) Relay cursor connections used on every list (no offset/limit).
